data.title: 33% of Q2 2025 home purchases made by investors, who own 20% of US residential homes, with smallest investors dominating.
data.description: In the United States, residential homes are predominantly owned by investors, who hold a 20% share of the market. The majority of these investors are small-scale, accounting for over 90% of the market. Recent data from the second quarter of 2025 reveals that real estate investors acquired 33% of all single-family residential properties sold during that period, marking the highest percentage in recent times.

data.title: Grant Thornton CFO survey: CFO optimism up 12% to 51% in Q3 2025, despite emerging challenges. conducted with 230 finance leaders.
data.description: In Chicago, results from Grant Thornton's latest survey highlight the remarkable adaptability of chief financial officers (CFOs) amid evolving challenges. The Q3 2025 CFO survey, encompassing insights from over 230 finance executives, displays a notable increase in optimism by 12 percentage points, reaching 51% from 39% in Q2. Despite this positive trend, CFOs continue to grapple with new tax legislation and uncertainties in the financial landscape. Grant Thornton, a prominent provider offering comprehensive audit, assurance, tax, and advisory solutions, underscores the resilience and agility demonstrated by CFOs in the current business environment.

data.title: NextGen Healthcare partners with Kno2 to improve healthcare interoperability nationwide. Aiming to help healthcare organizations by leveraging NextGen's decade-long expertise.
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, NextGen Healthcare, a top supplier of cutting-edge cloud-based healthcare tech solutions, has revealed a new collaboration with Kno2. Kno2, recognized as the nation's largest healthcare communication network and a designated Qualified Health Information Network (QHIN), will partner with NextGen to boost interoperability for healthcare institutions nationwide. With expertise in interoperability spanning over ten years, NextGen Healthcare aims to enhance connectivity for ambulatory healthcare providers.

data.title: Global disinfection robot market expected to reach USD 16.46 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 19.5%, starting at USD 3.40 billion in 2023.
data.description: In September 25, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide disinfection robot market saw substantial growth in recent years. Data from DataM Intelligence indicated that the market size was US$3.40 billion in 2023, increasing to US$3.95 billion in 2024. Projections suggest a significant upward trend, with expectations for the market to reach US$16.46 billion by 2033. This growth trajectory represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 19.5% throughout this period.

data.title: Chi Omega raises over $40 million for Make-A-Wish® after 24-year partnership, giving hope to kids with critical illnesses.
data.description: For the past 24 years, Make-A-Wish® and Chi Omega have worked together to bring hope to children facing critical illnesses. Recently, the organizations marked a major achievement in their partnership: Chi Omega has surpassed $40 million in funds raised. This has allowed them to continue transforming the lives of countless children. The collaboration, which began in 2001, has been instrumental in fulfilling the wishes of these young patients and providing them with moments of joy and strength.

data.title: LG's AI-powered Radio Optimism campaign celebrates love and gratitude; success announced in Seoul on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea on September 25, 2025, LG Electronics reported the positive outcome of its Radio Optimism campaign driven by artificial intelligence. The campaign underscored a fundamental realization that amidst technological progress, love and appreciation for family and close ones hold a paramount significance.

data.title: Nicklaus Children's Hospital joins CBTN for pediatric brain tumor research, strengthening efforts to help children.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Philadelphia, the Children's Brain Tumor Network (CBTN) announced the addition of Nicklaus Children's Hospital as a new member institution. This partnership expands CBTN's national presence and bolsters their mission to advance research for children facing brain tumors. Dr. Toba Niazi, Chief of Neurosurgery at Nicklaus Children's Hospital, expressed enthusiasm about joining forces with CBTN in this endeavor.

data.title: Hyundai donates $25,000 to Baystate Health Foundation for car seat safety, partnership provided 220+ seats to families.
data.description: Hyundai has contributed $25,000 to the Baystate Health Foundation in aid of its Pediatric Trauma Surgery Injury Prevention Car Seat Program. This collaboration, which began in 2023, has already resulted in the provision of over 220 car and booster seats to families facing financial constraints. The donation was made public in Holyoke, Massachusetts on September 25, 2025.

data.title: MT Sobek reveals new adventures for 2026, continuing its legacy since 1969 with immersive travel experiences.
data.description: A notable adventure travel company, MT Sobek, based in Emeryville, California, has been a frontrunner in immersive travel experiences since 1969. Recently, on September 25, 2025, the company announced the launch of its exciting new trips for the upcoming year 2026. Known for their innovative approach, MT Sobek remains at the forefront by introducing unique and thrilling adventures for travelers.

data.title: Genesis, U.S. Soccer Foundation, and MLSPA open mini-pitch in Georgia with the 4th Musco Mini-Pitch System installation.
data.description: Celebrating the grand opening of a new mini-pitch in City of South Fulton, Georgia, just outside of Atlanta, are Genesis, the U.S. Soccer Foundation, and the MLS Players Association (MLSPA). This marks the establishment of the fourth Musco Mini-Pitch Systems™ installation. The pitch aims to promote community sports by providing a dedicated space for soccer enthusiasts.
